projects.title: Backend Developer
projects.description:
Responsibilities:
  • Code refactoring/code improvement and implement TDD [RevivalPedia]
  • Implement and increase integration testing API coverage to existing API [RevivalPedia, RevivaLTV, Revival Livescore]
  • Improve code quality using Larastan: code analysis tool [RevivaLTV, Revival Livescore]
  • Build mobile API from existing API [RevivaLTV New World]
  • RnD & impelement MeiliSearch to existing API for create global search mobile API [RevivaLTV New World]
  • RnD & implement FusionAuth SSO Providers Google to existing Login/Register API (Integration only, FusionAuth is ready) [RevivaLTV]
  • RnD Statamic for replace Wordpress CMS [RevivaLTV News]
  • Bugfix, maintenance, and create new features based on PRD

projects.title: Backend Developer
projects.description:
Responsibilities:
  • Create REST API for every project from client
  • Design & Implementation Database
  • Setup Server on AWS
  • Setup CI/CD on Bitbucket
  • Testing apps & load test before live production with Apache JMeter

projects.title: Software Engineer
projects.description:
Responsibilities:
  • Analyzing software requirements every project from client
  • Composing software design e.g. database design, program flow, frontend and backend of system design
  • Implementing program code (coding) according to the design
  • Testing and validating the program code before it is submitted to the client
